---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: mfscpayload-690
---

## Summary

A short, clear description of the feature you're requesting.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What's the current limitation or pain point?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. How should it work? What should the UI look like?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this? Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be used.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
